_comment: Categorized CTA suggestions surfaced by the skill during the copy step. Match the intent (try / buy / book / apply / learn / watch / read) against the user's brief or pick from a labelled menu. Each entry is 1-3 words to fit ad CTA buttons. Sentence case throughout.

try-first.description: Free try, no commitment. Common for SaaS, tools, marketplaces.

buy.description: Direct purchase intent. E-commerce, paid products.

learn.description: Soft top-of-funnel, content download or longer read.
